title: Junior Investment Banker at Manappuram Finance Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Manappuram Finance Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Manappuram Finance Global Group in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Manappuram Finance Global Group:
Manappuram Finance Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
